4484 m_dwp_symfile = std::make_shared<SymbolFileDWARFDwo>(
4485 *this, dwp_obj_file, DIERef::k_file_index_mask);
4486 }
4487 }
4488 if (!m_dwp_symfile) {
4489 LLDB_LOG(log, "Unable to locate for DWP file for: \"{0}\"",
4490 m_objfile_sp->GetModule()->GetFileSpec());
4491 }
4492 });
4493 return m_dwp_symfile;
4494}
4495
4496llvm::Expected<lldb::TypeSystemSP>
4497SymbolFileDWARF::GetTypeSystem(DWARFUnit &unit) {
4498 return unit.GetSymbolFileDWARF().GetTypeSystemForLanguage(GetLanguage(unit));
4499}
4500
4501DWARFASTParser *SymbolFileDWARF::GetDWARFParser(DWARFUnit &unit) {
4502 auto type_system_or_err = GetTypeSystem(unit);
4503 if (auto err = type_system_or_err.takeError()) {
4504 LLDB_LOG_ERROR(GetLog(LLDBLog::Symbols), std::move(err),
4505 "Unable to get DWARFASTParser: {0}");
4506 return nullptr;
4507 }
4508 if (auto ts = *type_system_or_err)
4509 return ts->GetDWARFParser();
4510 return nullptr;
4511}
4512
4513CompilerDecl SymbolFileDWARF::GetDecl(const DWARFDIE &die) {
4514 if (DWARFASTParser *dwarf_ast = GetDWARFParser(*die.GetCU()))
4515 return dwarf_ast->GetDeclForUIDFromDWARF(die);
4516 return CompilerDecl();
4517}
4518
4519CompilerDeclContext SymbolFileDWARF::GetDeclContext(const DWARFDIE &die) {
4520 if (DWARFASTParser *dwarf_ast = GetDWARFParser(*die.GetCU()))
4521 return dwarf_ast->GetDeclContextForUIDFromDWARF(die);
4522 return CompilerDeclContext();
4523}
4524
4525CompilerDeclContext
4526SymbolFileDWARF::GetContainingDeclContext(const DWARFDIE &die) {
4527 if (DWARFASTParser *dwarf_ast = GetDWARFParser(*die.GetCU()))
4528 return dwarf_ast->GetDeclContextContainingUIDFromDWARF(die);
4529 return CompilerDeclContext();
4530}
4531
4532LanguageType SymbolFileDWARF::LanguageTypeFromDWARF(uint64_t val) {
4533 if (val <= eLanguageTypeLastStandardLanguage)
4534 return static_cast<LanguageType>(val);
4535
4536 // Note: user languages between lo_user and hi_user must be handled
4537 // explicitly here.
4538 switch (val) {
4539 case DW_LANG_Mips_Assembler:
4540 return eLanguageTypeMipsAssembler;
4541 default:
4542 return eLanguageTypeUnknown;
4543 }
4544}
4545
4546LanguageType SymbolFileDWARF::GetLanguage(DWARFUnit &unit) {
4547 return LanguageTypeFromDWARF(unit.GetDWARFLanguageType());
4548}
4549
4550LanguageType SymbolFileDWARF::GetLanguageFamily(DWARFUnit &unit) {
4551 auto lang = (llvm::dwarf::SourceLanguage)unit.GetDWARFLanguageType();
4552 if (llvm::dwarf::isCPlusPlus(lang))
4553 lang = DW_LANG_C_plus_plus;
4554 return LanguageTypeFromDWARF(lang);
4555}
4556
4557StatsDuration::Duration SymbolFileDWARF::GetDebugInfoIndexTime() {
4558 if (m_index)
4559 return m_index->GetIndexTime();
4560 return {};
4561}
4562
4563void SymbolFileDWARF::ResetStatistics() {
4564 m_parse_time.reset();
4565 if (m_index)
4566 return m_index->ResetStatistics();
4567}
4568
4569Status SymbolFileDWARF::CalculateFrameVariableError(StackFrame &frame) {
4570 std::lock_guard<std::recursive_mutex> guard(GetModuleMutex());
4571 CompileUnit *cu = frame.GetSymbolContext(eSymbolContextCompUnit).comp_unit;
4572 if (!cu)
4573 return Status();
4574
4575 DWARFCompileUnit *dwarf_cu = GetDWARFCompileUnit(cu);
4576 if (!dwarf_cu)
4577 return Status();
4578
4579 // Check if we have a skeleton compile unit that had issues trying to load
4580 // its .dwo/.dwp file. First pares the Unit DIE to make sure we see any .dwo
4581 // related errors.
4582 dwarf_cu->ExtractUnitDIEIfNeeded();
4583 const Status &dwo_error = dwarf_cu->GetDwoError();
4584 if (dwo_error.Fail())
4585 return dwo_error.Clone();
4586
4587 // Don't return an error for assembly files as they typically don't have
4588 // varaible information.
4589 if (dwarf_cu->GetDWARFLanguageType() == DW_LANG_Mips_Assembler)
4590 return Status();
4591
4592 // Check if this compile unit has any variable DIEs. If it doesn't then there
4593 // is not variable information for the entire compile unit.
4594 if (dwarf_cu->HasAny({DW_TAG_variable, DW_TAG_formal_parameter}))
4595 return Status();
4596
4597 return Status::FromErrorString(
4598 "no variable information is available in debug info for this "
4599 "compile unit");
4600}
4601
4602void SymbolFileDWARF::GetCompileOptions(
4603 std::unordered_map<lldb::CompUnitSP, lldb_private::Args> &args) {
4604
4605 const uint32_t num_compile_units = GetNumCompileUnits();
4606
4607 for (uint32_t cu_idx = 0; cu_idx < num_compile_units; ++cu_idx) {
4608 lldb::CompUnitSP comp_unit = GetCompileUnitAtIndex(cu_idx);
4609 if (!comp_unit)
4610 continue;
4611
4612 DWARFUnit *dwarf_cu = GetDWARFCompileUnit(comp_unit.get());
4613 if (!dwarf_cu)
4614 continue;
4615
4616 const DWARFBaseDIE die = dwarf_cu->GetUnitDIEOnly();
4617 if (!die)
4618 continue;
4619
4620 const char *flags = die.GetAttributeValueAsString(DW_AT_APPLE_flags, NULL);
4621
4622 if (!flags)
4623 continue;
4624 args.insert({comp_unit, Args(flags)});
4625 }
4626}
4627
4628DWOStats SymbolFileDWARF::GetDwoStats() {
4629 DWOStats stats;
4630
4631 DWARFDebugInfo &info = DebugInfo();
4632 const size_t num_cus = info.GetNumUnits();
4633 for (size_t cu_idx = 0; cu_idx < num_cus; cu_idx++) {
4634 DWARFUnit *dwarf_cu = info.GetUnitAtIndex(cu_idx);
4635 if (dwarf_cu == nullptr)
4636 continue;
4637
4638 // Check if this is a DWO unit by checking if it has a DWO ID.
4639 if (!dwarf_cu->GetDWOId().has_value())
4640 continue;
4641
4642 stats.dwo_file_count++;
4643
4644 // If we have a DWO symbol file, that means we were able to successfully
4645 // load it.
4646 SymbolFile *dwo_symfile =
4647 dwarf_cu->GetDwoSymbolFile(/*load_all_debug_info=*/false);
4648 if (dwo_symfile) {
4649 stats.loaded_dwo_file_count++;
4650 }
4651
4652 // Check if this unit has a DWO load error, false by default.
4653 const Status &dwo_error = dwarf_cu->GetDwoError();
4654 if (dwo_error.Fail())
4655 stats.dwo_error_count++;
4656 }
4657
4658 return stats;
4659}
